messages.not-found-text: You just hit a route that doesn''t' exist... the sadness.
messages.title: Easiest way to keep your team in the loop about your company news
messages.catchphrase: Easiest way to keep your team in the loop about your company news
messages.description: Your company home from a new tab, the lightest way to centralize and share company updates.
messages.availability: Available for Chrome and Firefox for now
messages.section-announcement-description: Whether it is Office news, HR news, Executive reports... Keep your team informed about the latest and important company news.
messages.section-team-description: In addition to the company announcements, what is more important than the People ? Favor team communication and People updates!
messages.section-workflow-description: Some people of your team don’t read their emails, you don’t want to disturb them on Slack? Our browser extension will share your company news at the right time.
messages.focus-title: We help your team keep focus
messages.focus-description: The browser extension will help your important news reach your employees with the perfect timing, without disturbing them.
